briefs.title: Strata building inspections now require updated professional credentials under BC rules
briefs.summary: BC updated the rules for who can conduct certain strata (condo building) inspections and depreciation reports. Qualified professionals must now be registered with specific engineering or technical associations named in the updated regulation.
briefs.action_required: Verify your strata inspector or engineer holds current registration with APEGBC or ASTTBC before hiring them.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Professional Services
